titleStmt.title: SII 34.73: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 73. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 26th year, Makara, sudi 13, Thursday, Ārdrā = A.D. 1096, January 10, Thursday.

This records the provision made by the peruṅguṟi-sabhā of the village of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Viṟai-kūṟṟam in Gēyavinōda-vaḷanāḍu for the Tai-pūsam festival and the śrī-bali service in the temple of Śrīkailāsamuḍaiyār in the village. It was decided for the purpose to collect one kuṟuṇi of paddy from each mā of all the cultivated land in the village and also to collect an uḻakku of oil from each house of the Veḷḷāḷas in the main village as well as in the hamlets. The concerned vāriyam has to take itself the responsibility of the collections.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyil ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilai keṭa villavar
kulaitara vikkala ciṅkaḷan mēlkaṭalpāya tikkaṉaittun tan cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅhāsanattu puvana
muḻutuṭaiyāḷōṭum vīṟṟiru
ntaruḷiya kōvirājakēśaripanma
āna tiribuvana sakravattikaḷ śrīkolōttuṅka cōḻade
vaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvatu vaṭakaraik kēyaviṉōta vaḷa
nāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu śrīkāmaravalli caruppētimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyōm Iyyāṭṭai makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu trayōtaśiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvātiraiḷ Ivūr śrīkayilāsamāna śrīrājēntitracōḻaiśvaramuṭaiyār kōyililē taṭṭaḻi koṭṭit tanmi Ūtik kūṭṭaṅkuṟaiyāmalk kūṭi Iruntu paṇippaṇiyāl paṇittu Ittēvar taippūcan tīrtthamāṭi Aruḷukaikku tiruutsavattukkuṭalāka nimantaṅkaṇṭapaṭiyāvatu Ivūr nīrpūci nelviḷainta nilattukku Ivvūrppaṭi Orumāvukku māttāl Ūr kālāl potuvē pūvil kuṟuṇi nellum varaku viḷainta nilattāllum Eḷ viḷainta nilattālum māttāl kuṟuṇi nelluṅ kamukālorupākkun tirukkāvaṇattukku tēvar
Akantinaṭṭa tōṭṭattāl nūṟalakkilōralakkum Ūrilum piṭākaiyilum veḷḷān maṉaiyāluḻakku viḷakkeṇṇaiyum Ivvaṉaittu mivviṭaṅkaḷil pōkasvāmikaḷāy vāriyamāy niṉṟārē Ittirumuṟṟattē koṭuvantu Aḷappikkavu miṭuvikkavuṅ kaṭavarākavu mippaṭi Ittanmam vāstuvukkuḷ bali Illāmaiyālum tiruvutsavamillāmaiyāluntiruvutsavamumbaliyum pōtukaikku muṭalāka nimandhattukku Aḻivu cēvār tiruvāṇai puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyārāṇai Ippaṭi paṇittān Irājakēcariccērik kaṇṭiyūr Araiyan cikaṇṭanārum kāmaravalliccēri Eṭṭukkūr bhavaśvāmikramavittarum cōḻamātēviccēri Ātanūr vīrantāmōtiram tirunallūr cātavētan civanum cattamaṅkalattu tana cōmanum Avani
rāl nārayaṇan sāhaśranum paṇiyālivvūr matdhyastan cūlamaṅkalamuṭaiyā nārāyaṇan tirumāliruñcōlai Eḻuttu Ittanmam Eḻunūṟṟaimpatiṟṟuvar Irakṣai Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṇṭiyūr maticūtana vapramēyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai maṇalūr kṛṣṇanvāman Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai kūvaṇṭur ṉan=ta nārāyaṇan sahaśran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai puḷḷamaṅkalattu vīrākkiyan caṅkarantivākaran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai puḷḷamaṅkalattup pāṇṭanpāṇan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai Ātanūr pāṇan tattan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkivai Ātanūr cūriyantattan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai kōṭṭaiyūr rājarājan Ampalattāṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai toḻūr puvatta nākan Eḻuttu Ittanmañ cēvittān Araiyan vētavanamuṭaiyā ṉit tanmam Aḻiyāmal kāttu rakṣittu nilainiṟuttinān Aṭippoṭi Entalaimēlitu
Digital edition of SII 34.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
